themes.exampleQuote: The drinks were amazing, the atmosphere was elegant, and the service was top notch.
The aesthetic is moody, vintage, and botanical, and the food and drinks are designed with so much creativity.
The servers and bar tenders were engaging and helpful, and it made the place feel hospitable and homey.
I have tried to get in a few times but it is always super packed!
After we ordered a third round of drinks, we were informed that we had to leave because there is a 90-minute time limit.
The price reflects the quality, atmosphere and overall experience you're going to have.

sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently rave about the inventive cocktails, moody speakeasy ambiance, and standout staff — but a poorly communicated 90-minute table limit and difficulty getting a seat are real friction points.
notable_quote: Commerce Bar is an entire experience - not just a bar.
